special_rules.name: Mirali Fortified Positions
special_rules.text: Bunkers are Fortifications, see EA 1.8.4. Gun Emplacements provide vehicles with a cover save that works like an infantry cover save, see EA 1.8.3. Gun Emplacements can hold one unit. Bunkers can hold three units.

special_rules.name: Commissar Allowance
special_rules.text: Mirali Skyraiders armies are allowed 1 Commissar per 500 points available.

profiles.name: Mirali Trackers
parse_warnings: Page 2 is rotated in the PDF; the Mirali Trackers row was cross-checked against the visible rendered table.
The OCR prints 'Miral Combat Blades'; this was normalized conservatively to 'Mirali Combat Blades'.
ambiguity_reasons: The rotated page OCR partially degrades the Mirali Trackers weapon column.

army_notes.name: Core Companies
army_notes.text: You may select any number of Core Companies.

army_notes.name: Support Formation Limit
army_notes.text: You may select 0-1 Support Formations for every Core Company chosen.

army_notes.name: Core Company Upgrades
army_notes.text: You may add 0-3 Upgrade choices to each Core Company Formation. No upgrade may be chosen more than once.

army_notes.name: Imperial Navy Allies
army_notes.text: Up to one third of your army may be composed of Imperial Navy formations.

army_notes.name: Terrain Table - Gun Emplacement
army_notes.text: Infantry 4+ cover save, Vehicle 5+ cover save, War Engine no effect.

army_notes.name: Terrain Table - Bunker
army_notes.text: Infantry 3+ cover save, Vehicle dangerous, War Engine impassable.

extraction_warnings: Page 2 of the Mirali PDF is rotated; the profile rows were cross-checked against the visible rendered table rather than trusting OCR order alone.
